cooperates.cooperate_desc: Ultimate (Heartguard) boosts Barats defense and sustain, making him even harder to kill.
Healing and movement speed boost help Barats chase enemies and stay alive longer.
Engages fights with stuns, allowing Barats to follow up with Detona Welcome (Ultimate).
His continuous healing allows Barats to stay in fights for longer durations.

counters.counter_desc: Her true damage from Passive (Lightwheel Mark) shreds Barats HP.
Dark Form (Chaos Assault) deals percentage-based damage, melting tanky heroes.
His Skill 2 (Searing Torrent) knocks Barats away, preventing Detona Welcome (Ultimate) from landing.
Her Passive (Molinas Gift) makes her harder to kill, and Skill 2 (Molina Smooch) can disrupt Barats

dominants.dominant_desc:
Start with Red Buff, then clear small camps before taking Purple Buff.
Prioritize fast jungle clears to build up Big Guy stacks for enhanced durability.
Gank sidelanes if enemies are overextended, using So-Called Teamwork (Skill 2) to slow them.
Secure the first Turtle with Retribution—Barats is tanky enough to contest early fights.

Use Detona Welcome (Ultimate) to initiate fights, eating enemy carries and displacing them.
Control objectives (Turtle/Lord) while protecting your backline.
Start building War Axe & Cursed Helmet for scaling damage and sustain Rotate with your team and cut off enemy jungle resources.

Stay in the frontlines, absorbing damage while zoning enemies.
Use Detona Welcome on high-value targets (MM/Mage) to disable them in team fights.
Stick with your team to contest Lord and secure late-game objectives.
Swap to defensive items like Immortality & Guardian Helmet for maximum survivability.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Boosts damage and sustain, perfect for a tanky-jungler playstyle.
Works well with Retribution to maintain presence in fights.
Helps in extended battles, allowing Barats to stay alive longer.

hero.hero_overview:
Durability: ★★★★☆
Offense: ★★★☆☆
Control: ★★★★☆
Difficulty: ★★☆☆☆

Barats, also known as the Dino Rider, is a unique hero in Mobile Legends. He is a duo character, where a tiny goblin-like creature named Barats rides a massive dinosaur called Detona. Together, they act as a tank/fighter hybrid capable of soaking up damage while also dealing sustained area-of-effect (AoE) damage.
hero.hero_strength:
High durability, scaling tankiness with passive.
Strong crowd control and initiation with his ultimate.
Great for disrupting enemy formations and protecting allies.
Effective in both offense and defense.
hero.hero_weakness:
Heavily reliant on passive stacks to be effective.
Can be kited by mobile heroes.
His ultimate requires proper positioning to maximize effectiveness.
Vulnerable to burst damage if caught without stacks.

data.recommend: This guide provides a **strong foundation** for playing Barats effectively as a jungle core. To make it even more comprehensive and optimized.

spell.spell_desc: Barats can be played as a jungler/core by utilizing Retribution, allowing him to farm efficiently and scale quickly. His Big Guy passive makes him extremely tanky while still dealing high damage, making him an effective frontliner and objective controller.

data.title: Barats - Dino Rider

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Mathilda gives him movement speed and additional shield they compliments each other.

counters.counter_desc: Direct counter for BARATS.

dominants.dominant_desc: Barats optimal jungle rotation starts with Red Buff for extra damage and slow, followed by Lithowanderer for movement speed and regen. Next, secure Blue Buff for mana sustain, then clear nearby jungle camps like the rock or crab for extra gold. Afterward, gank the EXP lane to gain an early advantage before contesting Turtle with team support. Continue farming while rotating to lanes, securing buffs, and applying pressure. This strategy ensures efficient farming and strong map presence.

emblems.emblem_desc: Use the Custom Tank Emblem (Brave Smite Talent) for HP regen and Ice Retribution for efficient jungling. In the early game, focus on farming and securing objectives. By the mid-game, start ganking and using Detonas Welcome to disrupt enemies. In the late game, stay in the frontline, absorb damage, and control key targets.

equips.equip_desc: Barats best item build in Mobile Legends (2025 Meta) focuses on durability and crowd control. Warrior Boots provide physical defense, while Tough Boots counter magic damage. Cursed Helmet and Guardian Helmet boost HP and sustain, enhancing his tankiness. Dominance Ice reduces enemy attack speed, making it effective against marksmen. Thunder Belt adds true damage and a slow effect, while Immortality ensures survivability in late-game fights. This build makes Barats a resilient frontline hero, ideal for soaking damage and disrupting enemies. Let me know if you need a specific build for jungle or EXP lane!

spell.spell_desc: Barats is a tank fighter jungler known for durability and crowd control. His best build includes Ice Retribution for slowing enemies, Warrior,Tough Boots for defense, Cursed Helmet for magic damage, Guardian Helmet for HP regen, Dominance Ice to counter attack speed, and Immortality for survival.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Floryn is an excellent support partner for Assassin Barats because her healing and shield abilities allow him to stay in fights longer despite his lack of natural tankiness in an assassin build. Floryn's ultimate,
Blooming Blessing, provides healing and a shield across the map, helping Barats survive risky engagements or dive onto squishy backline targets with more confidence. Her skill Sprout also provides AoE damage and a slow effect, which complements Barats' ability to chase down targets who

Angela amplifies Assassin Barats' potential by providing shields, heals, and added crowd control that enables him to engage and secure kills more safely. When Angela uses her ultimate, Heartguard, she attaches herself to Barats, providing a shield and additional healing that enhances his durability, allowing him to dive even deeper into enemy lines. Angela's Puppet-on-a-String ability can immobilize enemies, giving Barats a better chance to land his ultimate or skills without fear of retaliation

Aurora works well with Assassin Barats because her ability to freeze and control enemies lets him secure kills before they have a chance to respond. Aurora's passive, which freezes enemies when she fully charges her energy, can lock down multiple targets at once, providing Barats with the perfect setup to unleash his burst combo.When Barats dives into a frozen target, he can maximize his damage output without worrying about them escaping orcounterattacking. Additionally, Aurora's Cold Destruct

counters.counter_desc: Chou is a significant threat to Assassin Barats due to his mobility, crowd control, and ability to single out targets. Chou's Jeet Kune Do and Shunpo skills allow him to easily dodge Barats' abilities and reposition quickly, making it hard for Barats to land his burst damage. Additionally, The Way of Dragon (Chou's ultimate) can knock Barats out of position, disrupting his combo and leaving him vulnerable to counterattacks from Chou's team. With Chou's high mobility and ability to isolate Barats

Alpha counters Assassin Barats due to his strong early-game sustain and consistent damage output. Alpha's lifesteal and ability to withstand extended fights make it difficult for Barats to burst him down quickly, leaving Barats vulnerable in longer duels.

X.Borg is a tough matchup because of his true damage and armor mechanic. His armor bar absorbs Barats' initial burst, and his true damage output steadily whittles down Barats, who lacks sufficient defenses to survive X.Borg's sustained attacks.

Karrie can shred through Barats with her percentage-based true damage, making her highly effective against his stacked HP from Big Guy. Barats struggles to reach her due to her mobility, and even if he does, Karrie's damage quickly tears through his health.

Zhu Xin poses a challenge with his high burst and crowd control abilities, which can interrupt Barats' combo. Zhu Xin's mobility and control make it easy for him to dodge Barats' skills, while his damage output punishes Barats' lack of defense.

dominants.dominant_desc: Assassin Barats relies heavily on farming to reach his power spikes and patiently waiting for the enemy to make a mistake, as he lacks natural mobility and can be slow in chasing down targets. His limited movement means he isn't able to dive in and out like more agile assassins, so instead, Barats must focus on building up his Big Guy stacks through farming and positioning himself well for fights. When an enemy overextends or is isolated, Barats can seize the opportunity to engage, using his str

emblems.emblem_desc: Concussive Blast is a great talent for Assassin Barats because it adds an extra burst of AoE damage that synergizes with his assassin playstyle, enhancing his ability to eliminate squishy targets quickly. Concussive Blast deals additional AoE damage on the next basic attack after using a skill. Since Assassin Barats relies on quick, powerful bursts of damage to take down squishier enemies, this talent gives him an extra punch that complements his primary combo.

equips.equip_desc: Assassin Barats can be surprisingly effective with a build focused on War Axe, Thunderbelt, Skypiercer, and Oracle. This setup enhances his one-shot potential, while also allowing him to sustain better against support heroes like Angela and Floryn.

hero.hero_overview: Barats is a tank/fighter known for his unique ability to grow larger and gain increased defense and damage the longer he fights.Though commonly played as a tanky frontliner, you can gear him towards a bursty, assassin-like playstyle. This setup utilizes his damage scaling abilities to take down high-priority targets with quick, powerful strikes while still benefiting from his natural durability.
hero.hero_strength: Playing Assassin Barats offers unique strengths that allow him to pick off high-priority targets and disrupt enemy backlines effectively. Here's a breakdown of his main strengths in this assassin-oriented build. Thunderbelt and War Axe amplify Barats' damage with true damage and increased Physical Attack. This allows him to dish out burst damage, especially when targeting squishier heroes like mages and marksmen.
hero.hero_weakness: When playing Assassin Barats, you'll have unique weaknesses that are different from a traditional tank Barats or a pure assassin hero. Here's how Barats' assassin build compares to heroes like Alpha and Alice, highlighting his main vulnerabilities: Heroes like Alpha can dish out consistent damage regardless of build-up, while Alice has reliable damage and mobility without needing a stacking mechanic.
